name: Pyc Therapeutics Limited
analysis: PYC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$1.4750. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.5600, stop A$1.1236, target A$1.7200 (0.37:1) — then trail it.
